title: No Microsoft Splashes
description: Removes all of the Minecraft Splashes and Credits after the acquisition of Mojang and returns the ones that had left. (Reverts to 1.8.8)
body:
![No Microsoft Splashes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5ec4a571103294f3ffe5714ca2aa480b837de32.png)
No Microsoft Splashes is a Resource Pack that gets rid of all the Minecraft Splashes & Credits that were added after Microsoft acquired Mojang in 2014.
![No Microsoft FAQ:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8fef7241000b7e7fb26cc48698130f07b69b2de.png) Here are some Frequently Asked Questions that I ask myself.
Frequently Asked Questions **Why did you make this?** > I don't like big tech, but I do like Minecraft. Unfortunetely, Minecraft is owned by a big tech company. **Are you going make this avalible on earlier versions?** > Yeah, I think so; I just need time to do it. But it's honestly not that hard to do. You could probably do it if you wanted to. **What's up with the goofy logo?** > Yeahhh, so I didn't think it was a good idea to use Microsoft's actual logo, so I just... made that...

### 📄 Other projects - [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-credits) [No Credits](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-credits) - Removes (most of) the long credits that some people don't want to see. - [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-credits) [Old Credits](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/old-credits) - Reverts the credits to how they were in release 1.8.8, before Microsoft bought Minecraft. (YOU DON'T NEED THIS IF YOU ALREADY HAVE THIS RESOURCE PACK) - More coming soon
